text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The morning of my day off, I spot Daiwa Scarlet
standing in front of the pharmacy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Trainer?! Stop right there! Don't come near
me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Well... The thing is... I've got a pimple on
my forehead.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And after I made sure to come here bright and
early so I wouldn't run into anyone I knew... Just
my luck.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Anyway, there you have it. Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems to be suffering from skin
problems...
